title: Old Ore Drops
description: Drop Ores instead of raw materials
body:
Brings back the classic ore drops!
Do you dislike those pesky raw materials? Well if you do, this is the mod for you!
This mod Makes Gold, Iron, And Copper Drop ores even without silk touch, just like old school Minecraft!

Modifies the Following Drops: 

- Gold Ore - Now drops gold ore without silk touch.
- Iron Ore - Now drops gold ore without silk touch.
- Copper Ore - Now drops gold ore without silk touch.
- Deepslate Gold Ore - Now drops Deepslate Gold Ore ore without silk touch.
- Deepslate Iron Ore - Now drops Deepslate Iron ore without silk touch.
- Deepslate Copper Ore - Now drops Deepslate Copper ore without silk touch.
